query:
SELECT 
  t.id,
  t.description,
  t.amount,
  t.nature,
  t.date,
  DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(t.date/1000), '%d/%m/%Y') as data_formatada
FROM transactions t
WHERE t.userId = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'caduleitenet@gmail.com')
AND t.description LIKE '%Saldo Inicial%'
AND MONTH(FROM_UNIXTIME(t.date/1000)) = 4
AND YEAR(FROM_UNIXTIME(t.date/1000)) = 2026;
